_docs: Full reference for assets/brand.json. Copy, rename to brand.json, and edit. All fields are optional — defaults shown here.

colors._docs: All values are hex strings: #RRGGBB or #AARRGGBB

typography._docs: font_family is any Google Fonts name. scale adjusts the entire type scale (0.9 = smaller, 1.1 = larger).

logo._docs: Place your logo PNG/SVG at the asset path. use_text_fallback shows app_name as text if image fails to load.

store._docs: Currency and locale affect number formatting throughout the app.

features._docs: Set boolean fields to true/false. Three-state fields accept 'auto', 'true', or 'false'.
features._customer_auth: Enable customer login/register. Disable for guest-only ordering.
features._firebase_auth: Use Firebase Auth (email+password) backed by your Pro Firebase project. Requires an active Xeboki Pro subscription with Firebase enabled. Leave false for REST-based auth.
features._loyalty: Show loyalty points in customer account and checkout.
features._discount_codes: Show promo code field at checkout.
features._order_scheduling: Allow customers to schedule orders for a future time.
features._table_ordering: 'auto' = on for restaurant/bar/cafe, off otherwise. 'true'/'false' to override.
features._appointments: 'auto' = on for salon/gym/service types, off otherwise.
features._meal_deals: 'auto' = on for food businesses, off otherwise.
features._dark_mode: Allow customers to switch to dark theme.
features._stripe_payments: Enable Stripe card payments. Set stripe_publishable_key in checkout section.
features._apple_pay: Show Apple Pay button (iOS only). Requires stripe_payments: true.
features._google_pay: Show Google Pay button (Android only). Requires stripe_payments: true.

checkout._default_order_type: One of: pickup, delivery, dine_in, takeaway
checkout._allowed_order_types: Subset of: pickup, delivery, dine_in, takeaway. Only listed types appear on the order-type selector.
checkout._payment_methods: Subset of: cash, card, gift_card. Order determines display order in checkout.
checkout._require_customer_for_dine_in: Force customers to log in before placing a dine-in order.
checkout.delivery_note: We deliver within 5 miles. Enter your full address in the notes field.
checkout._stripe_publishable_key: Your Stripe publishable key (pk_live_... or pk_test_...). Never put your secret key here.
checkout._stripe_connected_account_id: Stripe Connect account ID (acct_...) if using Xeboki Launchpad payment routing. Leave empty for direct charges.
checkout._minimum_spend: Minimum order total before checkout is allowed. 0 = no minimum.
checkout._tip_presets: Tip percentage buttons shown to the customer. Requires tipping: true.
checkout._default_delivery_fee: Flat delivery fee when no zone pricing is configured in the POS. 0 = free.
checkout._free_delivery_threshold: Orders at or above this total qualify for free delivery. 0 = always charge.
checkout._dine_in_discount_pct: Auto-applied discount % for dine-in orders (e.g. 10 for 10% off). 0 = none.
checkout._collection_discount_pct: Auto-applied discount % for pickup/collection orders. 0 = none.

social._docs: Full URLs. Leave empty to hide the social link.
